def: A charge for applying rust-preventative coating to the underside of a vehicle, often sold at highly inflated prices by dealerships.
avoid: Decline dealer-offered undercoating; most modern cars come factory-protected.

def: A fraudulent practice where a healthcare provider bills for a more expensive service than what was actually performed.
avoid: Always review your Explanation of Benefits against what was actually done; verify procedure codes.

def: A tactic where a business intentionally provides unclear pricing information, hiding fees until the final bill.
avoid: Always ask for total all-in pricing upfront in writing; get detailed itemized quotes.

def: A charge for etching the VIN into car windows as theft deterrent, costing dealers very little but sold at high prices.
avoid: Decline VIN etching outright; buy a DIY kit online for under $20 if desired.

def: A charge for waiving something such as a cancellation penalty, a fee, or a contract requirement.
avoid: Ask for fee waivers as a courtesy before signing; negotiate the fee down or away.

def: A charge for sending or receiving money via wire transfer, domestic or international. Wires are faster but cost more than ACH.
avoid: Use ACH, Zelle, or Wise for lower-cost transfers instead of wire transfers.
